title: AircraftSingleResponse
description: Full aircraft model with all available information.

hex.description: The ICAO 24-bit address (hex) of the aircraft.

type.description: The type of message (e.g., adsb_icao, tisb_icao, etc.).

t.description: Aircraft type (e.g., B38M for Boeing 737 MAX 8).

dbFlags.description: Bitfield for certain database flags, below and must be a bitwise and … check the documentation for your programming language

mach.description: Mach number (speed as a fraction of the speed of sound).

oat.description: Outer/Static air temperature (OAT), typically somewhat inaccurate at lower altitudes.

tat.description: Total air temperature (TAT), typically somewhat inaccurate at lower altitudes.

track.description: Aircraft track over the ground in degrees.

track_rate.description: Rate of change of the track in degrees per second.

baro_rate.description: Barometric vertical rate (climb or descent) in feet per minute.

geom_rate.description: Geometric vertical rate (climb or descent) in feet per minute.

category.description: Aircraft category based on size and weight.

nav_qnh.description: QNH setting (altimeter pressure setting) in hPa.

nav_altitude_mcp.description: MCP (Mode Control Panel) altitude setting in feet.

nav_altitude_fms.description: Selected altitude from the Flight Management System (FMS) in feet.

nav_modes.description: Navigation modes: autopilot, vnav, althold, approach, lnav, tcas

rr_lat.description: Rough estimated latitude based on receiver's position.

rr_lon.description: Rough estimated longitude based on receiver's position.

lastPosition.description: Last known position if lat/lon are older than 60 seconds.

gpsOkBefore.description: Indicator of whether GPS was working well before degradation.

gpsOkLat.description: Indicator of whether GPS was working well before degradation - latitude.

gpsOkLon.description: Indicator of whether GPS was working well before degradation - longitude.

rc.description: Containment Radius of Accuracy in meters.

seen_pos.description: Time since the last positional update in seconds.

sil_type.description: Source Integrity Level type (e.g., per hour or per sample).

alert.description: Alert status (whether the transponder is indicating an alert).

mlat.description: List of fields derived from MLAT data (e.g., "lat", "lon", "nic", "rc").

tisb.description: List of fields derived from TIS-B data (e.g., "gs", "lat", "lon", "nic", "rc", "nac_p", "sil", "sil_type").

messages.description: The number of messages received from the aircraft.

seen.description: Time since the last message was received, in seconds.

acas_ra.description: ACAS Resolution Advisory data (experimental, subject to change).

now.description: Unix milliseconds timestamp of the time the data was put into the cache.

geometries.description:
Contains caller-supplied collection of properties (up to 5) per matched geometry.
Properties are propagated from each geometry object in the filter request.
